models.name: GPT-5.6 Sol
models.note_en: OpenAI's current flagship frontier agentic coding model, available across ChatGPT, Codex, and the API.
models.note_zh: OpenAI 現行旗艦前沿代理程式模型，已於 ChatGPT、Codex 與 API 提供。

models.name: Claude Opus 4.8
models.note_en: Anthropic's current Opus model for demanding reasoning, coding, and long-running agent workflows.
models.note_zh: Anthropic 現行 Opus 模型，面向高難度推理、程式開發與長時間代理工作流。

models.name: DeepSeek-V3.1
models.note_en: A hybrid model with thinking and non-thinking modes, stronger agent skills, and open weights.
models.note_zh: 同一模型整合思考與非思考模式，強化代理工具能力並開放權重。

models.name: GPT-5
models.note_en: OpenAI's unified flagship system with built-in thinking and stronger coding, reasoning, and tool use.
models.note_zh: OpenAI 統一旗艦系統，內建思考能力，並提升程式、推理與工具使用表現。

models.name: Claude Opus 4.1
models.note_en: An Opus 4 upgrade focused on agentic tasks, real-world coding, reasoning, and detail tracking.
models.note_zh: Opus 4 升級版，著重代理任務、真實程式開發、推理與細節追蹤。

models.name: Grok 4 / Grok 4 Heavy
models.note_en: xAI's frontier reasoning models with native tool use and real-time search integration.
models.note_zh: xAI 前沿推理模型，原生整合工具使用與即時搜尋。

models.name: Claude Opus 4 / Sonnet 4
models.note_en: Anthropic's next-generation models for coding, advanced reasoning, and long-running agent workflows.
models.note_zh: Anthropic 新一代模型，強化程式開發、進階推理與長時間代理工作流。

models.name: OpenAI o3 / o4-mini
models.note_en: Reasoning models that can agentically combine ChatGPT tools and reason over visual inputs.
models.note_zh: 可自主組合 ChatGPT 工具，並能針對視覺輸入進行推理的模型。

models.name: Llama 4 Scout / Maverick
models.note_en: Meta's first open-weight, natively multimodal mixture-of-experts models in the Llama 4 family.
models.note_zh: Meta 首批 Llama 4 開放權重、原生多模態混合專家模型。

models.name: Gemini 2.5 Pro
models.note_en: Google's thinking model for complex reasoning, coding, math, and science tasks.
models.note_zh: Google 思考型模型，面向複雜推理、程式、數學與科學任務。

models.name: Grok 3 Beta
models.note_en: xAI's early preview combining larger-scale pretraining with reinforced reasoning capabilities.
models.note_zh: xAI 早期預覽模型，結合更大規模預訓練與強化推理能力。

models.name: DeepSeek-R1
models.note_en: DeepSeek's open reasoning model, released with model weights and technical documentation.
models.note_zh: DeepSeek 開放推理模型，同步釋出模型權重與技術資料。
